Sales Call Transcript — Customer Automation
Date: 2026-07-06
Attendees: Account Executive (Insight), IT Director (Customer Automation)

IT Director: We're currently running our customer journey automation on an ageing
on-prem stack and it's becoming expensive to maintain. We're evaluating a move to
the cloud over the next two quarters.

Account Executive: Understood. Are you looking primarily at infrastructure
modernisation, or also at the application and data layers?

IT Director: Both, ideally. We'd want to modernise the data platform and add some
AI-driven analytics on top. Security and compliance are also a big concern for us
given the industry we operate in.

Account Executive: That aligns well with our portfolio. We can help with cloud
adoption, data platform modernisation, and a security and compliance workstream.

IT Director: Budget is a factor, so we'd need clear pricing and a phased approach.

Account Executive: Noted — we'll put together a phased proposal with clear pricing
tiers and identify where we can add value beyond the initial request.
